elements.original_description: A white question mark floating in the center of a pure white background, tilted slightly to the right. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: professional 2D minimalist icon of a white question mark floating in the exact center of a pure white background, tilted slightly to the right. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading, no gradients, no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks. Sharp edges, solid fill.
